title: Add Grok activity for model descriptions

log.context: Add Grok activity for model descriptions

All clean. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Changes made:**

1. `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/scout_local.py`
   - Added `aiohttp`, `os`, and `load_env_key` imports (the file previously had no I/O deps)
   - Added `generate_model_description` activity at the bottom — calls `https://api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions` directly with `grok-3-mini`, using `XAI_API_KEY` from the env. Takes `model_name`, `model_id`, and a `model_info` dict (params, source, pipeline_tag, tags, context_length,...(truncated)
